title: Notification of Termination of Appointment of Co-Counsel for Mr Rexhep Selimi with two confidential Annexes
text:
KSC-BC-2020-06/F03719/1 of 2 PUBLIC
A01 14/04/2026 12:38:00
A02
In: KSC-BC-2020-06
Before: Trial Panel II
Judge Charles L. Smith III, Presiding Judge
Judge Christoph Barthe
Judge Guénaël Mettraux
Judge Fergal Gaynor, Reserve Judge
Registrar: Dr Fidelma Donlon
Filed by: Registrar
Date: 14 April 2026
Language: English
File Name: The Specialist Prosecutor v. Hashim Thaçi, Kadri Veseli,
Rexhep Selimi and Jakup Krasniqi
Classification: Public
Notification of Termination of Appointment of Co-Counsel for Mr Rexhep Selimi
with two confidential Annexes
Specialist Prosecutor’s Office Specialist Counsel for Hashim Thaçi
Kimberly P. West Luka Mišetić
Victims’ Counsel Specialist Counsel for Kadri Veseli
Simon Laws Rodney Dixon
Registry Specialist Counsel for Rexhep Selimi
Head of Defence Office Geoffrey Roberts
Specialist Counsel for Jakup Krasniqi
Venkateswari Alagendra

KSC-BC-2020-06/F03719/2 of 2 PUBLIC
14/04/2026 12:38:00
1
1. Pursuant to Rule 26(1) of the Rules and Section 18(6) of the Directive on
Counsel,2 the Registrar hereby informs the Trial Panel of the termination of Ms Rudina
Jasini’s (‘Ms Jasini’) appointment as Co-Counsel for Mr Rexhep Selimi (‘Mr Selimi’).
2. On 27 March 2026, Counsel for Mr Selimi, Mr Geoffrey Roberts, sent a letter to
the Head of the Defence Office stating that he decided to terminate Ms Jasini’s contract
as Co-Counsel for Mr Selimi with immediate effect.3 Pursuant to Section 18(6) of the
Directive on Counsel, Counsel informed the Defence Office that the termination of
Ms Jasini’s contract would be accomplished without adverse effect on the interests of
Mr Selimi and the duration of the proceedings.
3. On 7 April 2026, the Registrar confirmed the termination of Ms Jasini’s contract
as Co-Counsel for Mr Selimi in accordance with Section 18(6) of the Directive on
Counsel.4
4. Pursuant to Rule 82(1)(b) and (3) of the Rules, the Registrar submits Annexes 1
and 2 to this filing as confidential, as they contain personal information concerning
Counsel and former Co-Counsel.
Word count: 260
_____________________
Dr Fidelma Donlon
Registrar
Tuesday, 14 April 2026
At The Hague, the Netherlands
1 Rules of Procedure and Evidence Before the Kosovo Specialist Chambers, KSC-BD-03/Rev3/2020,
2 June 2020, public (‘Rules’); see also Law No. 05/L-053 on Specialist Chambers and Specialist
Prosecutor’s Office, 3 August 2015, arts 21(4), 21(5), 34(7) and 41(4)(b).
2 Directive on Counsel, KSC-BD-04/Rev1/2021, 28 April 2021.
3 See Annex 1, Letter of Termination of appointment of Ms Rudina Jasini as Co-Counsel for Mr Rexhep
Selimi, 27 March 2026, confidential.
4 See Annex 2, Letter of Termination of Services Co-Counsel, KSC/REG/IOR/8962, 7 April 2026,
confidential.
KSC-BC-2020-06 2 14 April 2026
